breaking.title: West Asia war LIVE: U.S. strikes Iran after Apache helicopter downing
breaking.summary: United States President Donald Trump on Tuesday, June 9, said that a U.S. military helicopter was shot down by Iran and that the United States "must" respond.

breaking.title: YouTuber Jesse Ridgway blasts in-laws for not supporting wife after ending pregnancy due to Down syndrome
breaking.summary: Jesse Ridgway revealed his wife Ashley faces family estrangement after their difficult decision to terminate a pregnancy due to Down syndrome. He claims some of Ashley's relatives are absent and even join online criticism, intensifying her grief. While his own parents offer support, the couple navigates private sorrow and public backlash, focusing on mutual strength.

breaking.title: US stocks: S&P 500, Nasdaq fall as tech selling resumes, Trump vows to react to downed US helicopter
breaking.summary: U.S. stocks fell Tuesday as technology shares reversed earlier gains amid renewed selling pressure. President Trump's vow to respond to Iran shooting down a U.S. helicopter added to Middle East war concerns. Investors also eyed upcoming inflation data and the highly anticipated SpaceX IPO.

breaking.title: Nurses hold 2-hour strike in Haryana, demand resignation of women panel’s chairperson
Does referee case show Fifa has lost control of its own World Cup?
breaking.summary: With referee Omar Artan denied entry to the United States and worries over staff and supporters being turned back, what does this tell us about the World Cup?

breaking.title: Disorder breaks out in Belfast after man charged with knife attack
breaking.summary: Police and political leaders call for calm after disorder breaks out in parts of Northern Ireland.

breaking.title: Who are Alex Zabel and DAA Juice? True crime YouTubers at center of Nancy Guthrie case controversy
breaking.summary: Alex Zabel of CriminalNetwork and Troy Bradshaw, known as DAA Juice, were arrested while covering the Nancy Guthrie abduction case in Tucson. Their arrests led to widespread criticism of Sheriff Chris Nanos and the Pima County Sheriff’s Department online. Supporters say the pair helped keep attention on the case, while the investigation into Guthrie’s disappearance continues.

breaking.title: Inside Myanmar, rebels are losing ground as military forces men into army
breaking.summary: The BBC travels with rebels to frontline positions in Myanmar to see how the war is unfolding.
